characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: Big Ol' Eyebrows: He’s got quite the bushy brows. Combat Pragmatist:Attacks Lady Ogen without warning as soon as she turns her back on him, right after the former Shogun announces the contest between the ten ninja representatives from each clan. Evil Gloating: His gloating and disparaging of Ogenafter fatally backstabbing her indicates that he's become a callous man who no longer has any love for her whatsoever. Hoist by His Own Petard:Ogen use one of the large needles thrown at her to stab him through the heart. I Was Quite a Looker: While not a superBishōnen, he was quiteTall, Dark, and Handsomein the past

characters.name: Kouga Danjou
characters.description: Big Ol' Eyebrows: He’s got quite the bushy brows. Combat Pragmatist:Attacks Lady Ogen without warning as soon as she turns her back on him, right after the former Shogun announces the contest between the ten ninja representatives from each clan. Evil Gloating: His gloating and disparaging of Ogenafter fatally backstabbing her indicates that he's become a callous man who no longer has any love for her whatsoever. Hoist by His Own Petard:Ogen use one of the large needles thrown at her to stab him through the heart. I Was Quite a Looker: While not a superBishōnen, he was quiteTall, Dark, and Handsomein the past

characters.name: Kouga Gennosuke
characters.description: Danjo's heir and strongest member of the Kouga ninja. He's a peace-loving idealist who's genuinely in love with Oboro and wants to put an end to years of hate and rivalry. His special power is a "Do Jutsu" (Fierce Ability) in his eyes, that allows him tosend an attacker's killing intent back at him.Commits suicide after witnessing Oboro's suicide. He is the very last of the twenty ninjas to die. Beware the Nice Ones: He is polite and calm, but no one should provoke him enough to use hisDeath Glare. Those who do willdie. Big Ol' Eyebrows: A trait he takes from his grandpa. Brought Down to Badass: Gennosuke's deprived of both his vision and (by extension) his ninja arts for a good chunk of the story. This only makes him the most dangerous combatant to alesser degreethan before, it doesn't actually bump him down. Death Glare: Literally! His Do Jutsu allows him to reverse an assailant's killing intent and force them to commit suicide. He also looks very livid when using this power.

characters.name: Kazamachi Shougen
characters.description: Animal Motifs: Spider, of course. Arachnid Appearance and Attire: The combination of his spindly limbs, tendency to get around on all fours, bulbous hunchback, and brow studs makes him look a lot like a giant spider. Defiant to the End:When Hotarubi tries to force him to confess all he knows, he spits on her cheek. And he gets'nightmarishlystabbed for his trouble. Gonk: Ugly of face, hunched of back, with teeth knocked out to let his grotesque tongue protrude and six crimson studs embedded in his brows in two vertical rows of three, which furthers his resemblance to a spider. Hidden Depths: In a flashback, he's shown that he enjoys fishing in his spare time, using both a pole or his web spit to catch fish.

characters.name: Udono Jousuke
characters.description: A fat, jolly ninja who's often seen near Gennosuke. Despite coming off like a perverted moron, he's very competent and smarter than he lets on. His body is like a rubber balloon, making him able to squeeze through small openings, absorb physical impacts without harm, or expand his body to become a living ball that can propel itself super-high into the air or roll at high speeds along the ground.Is killed by Jingoro, whoforces himself down his gulletwhile in slug form. This makes him the fifth ninja to die. Acrofatic: Because his "balloon technique" lets him inflate himself like a balloon, he can leap incredibly high, and move with incredible speed by rolling around. Be the Ball: To get around more quickly. Berserk Button: The smile from his face quickly dissipates when he finds Jingoro after following the trail leading to Gennosuke's room and puts two and two together. Beware the Silly Ones: He's a cheerful guy who seems to be more into flirting and fighting than anything else, butdamn he's good at fighting.

characters.name: Jimushi Juubei
characters.description: One of the more mysterious and grotesque members, he's a limbless man who serves his clan as an astromancer and seer.Though he has no arm nor legs, but can fight with an extremely long prehensile tongue and a knife hidden in his throat. His scale armor allows him to crawl around really fast like a snake. He kills Tenzen for the first time, but is cornered by the latter after resurrecting, and is promptly bifurcated by Tenzen. This makes him the fourth ninja to die. Animal Motifs: Snakes. Bond One-Liner/Badass Boast: Does oneafter killing Tenzen with his spear. He comments that if the enemies knew of his technique he would be dead, but by the time the enemy actually learn of his technique it's they who are dead. Defiant to the End:Cornered by Tenzen and the Iga Ninja, he still tries to kill Tenzen again with his technique. The Grotesque: His features aren't so ugly, but he's physically deformed in the "human torso" style — he has no arms or legs, just a head atop a torso. This forces him to be carried or crawl everywhere.

characters.name: Kisaragi Saemon
characters.description: Member of the Kouga Ninja he's a short and sneaky guy whose eyes are always shut. He's Okoi's older brother. His powers allow him to transform into anyone, simulate voices and even change his size.He's eventually tricked by Tenzen and killed by the soldiers escorting the Iga ninja. Adaptational Nice Guy: His personality is fairly cynical and ruthless in the manga but the anime tones down these traits. In the latter, he will still resort to brutal violence if necessary, but he's rather reasonable outside of combat and is not above showing sympathy to slain opponents. Beware the Nice Ones: In the anime, he is sympathetic to Gennosuke's desires for peace and is rarely shown enjoying the fighting or violence. Nonetheless, he's still willing to maim and kill when the situation calls for it. A notable instance is when heslices Hotarubi's arms off and then proceeds to impale her. Big Brother Instinct: Towards Okoi.When she died,all bets were offin regards to him. Certainly explains thehorribleway in which he killed Hotarubi, when not even a single hour had passed. Death by Irony:He kills Hotarubi and Akeginu by disguising himself as someone they trusted, and backstabbing them once their guard was down. He dies in thisexactsame manner when Tenzen disguises himself as one of Ofuku's men.

characters.name: Muroga Hyouma
characters.description: A good friend of Saemon and Danjou's advisor. He's Gennosuke's maternal uncle and he taught him everything he knows,including the Dojutsu. He appears to be blind and has an excellent hearingbut he can actually use the Dojutsu. In fact he can't turn it off, hence why he always keeps his eyes closed. Gets killed by Koshirou, whose blindness allows him to work around the Doujutsu's only weakness. Abled in the Adaptation: In the original novel and the manga, he has sensitive eyes that make him blind in bright light. He doesn't have that issue in the anime.On the other hand,the novel shows that he can control his Doujitsu, while in the manga and anime his eyes' ability is constantly active. Adaptational Nice Guy: In the manga and novel, Hyoma is just as eager to face the Iga and destroy them. The anime gives him a deep sense of humanism and warmth where he is one of the only Kouga to desire peace with the Iga. He's even the one to inspire Gennosuke's own best qualities. Beware the Nice Ones: Next to Gennosuke, he's the most sympathetic and reasonable of the Kouga, but still, you really shouldn't mess with him. Blind Weaponmaster: Hyoma keeps his eyes closed most of the time, but he's just as good with his sword as Gennosuke is.

characters.name: Kasumi Gyoubu
characters.description: A large and massive ninja of Kouga. Always seen around Hyouma and Saemon. He's very strong and can merge with any solid surface, allowing him to move around unseen.As a child he was traumatized by his father's death and shaved his head because of that. He's impaled by Tenzen while trying to flee from him and his corpse is merged inside a wooden panel, exhibited as a warning to the Kougas. He is the twelth ninja to die. Adaptational Badass: In the manga he mostly employs his powers for sneak attacks and ambushes. In the anime, at one point he emerges in plain sight andgrabs two katanain order to face the Iga Ninja in combat. Adaptational Nice Guy: In the manga, Gyobu is vicious toward the Iga for no reason but the ancient grudge and rather sadistic about it. The anime gives him moments of warmth with his comrades and introduces the backstory of his father's death having changed his nature and shows him horrified at collateral damage. Bald Head of Toughness: Subverted. He's a giant of a man, with not a single strand of hair on his head, which makes you think his deadliness comes from his brute physical strength. However, it's his more covert abilities that truly makes him one of the toughest of the Kouga clan. Barbie Doll Anatomy: There's only a white blank on his groin where his genitals should be.

characters.name: Okoi
characters.description: One of the two kunoichi of Kouga, and also Saemon's little sister. Okoi's a large, well muscled tomboy, but she's ready to take advantage of her large breasts if needed.She's essentially a human-leech who can drain people's blood through her skin, causing physical pain. The more contact, the quicker she's able to absorb. Even more effective as they are unable to separate from the area they're touching. Okoi is captured and interrogated by the Iga clan, and while she manages to kill Rousai in the process, she is in turn killed by Nenki while trying to escape, making her the eighth ninja to die. Action Girl: A capable fighter, although some viewers may see her as aDark Action Girlfor the pleasure she sometimes derives from using her special powers. Adaptation Expansion: Gets more screentime in the anime, including an episode where she tries to chase down an unknown spy (who's revealed to be Hanzo's son Kyouhachirou). Amazonian Beauty: Very tall. Very muscle-bound. Very beautiful. Animal Motifs:Leeches.

characters.name: Kagerou
characters.description: The other kunoichi of the Kouga clan. She's a feminine woman with black hair and red lips, madly in love with Gennosuke, and vehemently jealous of Oboro. When she's aroused, her breath becomes a poisonous miasma.She's raped and horrifically tortured by Tenzen with needles, which breaks her even further. Adaptational Jerkass: The anime makes her a full-blownYandere. Angst: Given her powers, this is pretty justified. Blessed with Suck: Big time. Since her breath doesn't distinguish friend or foe, she's unable to even embrace the one she's in love without starting to kill them. Discussion between Hyoma and Saemon reveal it's likely an inherited technique as her mother also posessed such an ability, and how it was about time for Kagerou to start trying to bear children; something they note will doubtlessly kill countless (very willing) men before she conceives. Bodyguard Crush: For Gennosuke.

characters.name: Iga-no-Ogen
characters.description: The elderly leader of the Iga clan, she used to be in love with Danjou. Ogen doesn't seem to have any outright abilities other than a hawkshe appears to have a psychic bond with. She's the second person to die in the series, killed by Danjou's needles. Not before taking him with her though. Brutal Honesty: When informing Oboro that she's far too clumsy to be a ninja. (Though she's notasharsh in the anime.) Friend to All Living Things: Seems to be her power, given how her hawk'stimely distraction of Danjou allows her the opportunity to kill him. It was also trained to follow the commands of whomever is handling its tassel. I Was Quite a Looker: As a young woman, she was very pretty who looked a lot like thesmoking hotAkeginu. Made of Iron:Survived a needle piercing across her neck and another straight through her mouth long enough to pull it out and use it to kill Danjou.

characters.name: Iga-no-Oboro
characters.description: Ogen's granddaughter and Gennosuke's soon-to-be wife. She's a very sweet and clumsy person. She can't fight, but her eyes have the power of cancelling any ninja power or technique seen, which is considered as one of the mostdeadlypowers in the whole series.After going through a long series ofBreak the Cutiemoments she kills herself in order to allow Gennosuke to win. Anti-Magic: Her "Piercing Eyes" are basically this, and are mentioned to be thedeadliestpower ever among both clans. Break the Cutie: Oohh boy. She's a gentle and kind young woman who just wants to marry her boyfriend Gennosuke so they can finish the long-time hatred between their clans. But then the story hits and she's brutally, horribly broken... Cursed with Awesome: How many of the other ninjas see her. Girl cannot fight at all and yet she has the potentiallydeadliestpower. Cute Clumsy Girl: Pointed out by her own grandmother too. AndnotPlayed for Laughs.

characters.name: Yashamaru
characters.description: The first Iga ninja shown along with Ogen. He's apretty boywho can use the hair of deceased women, treated with animal oils, as deadly garrot wires. He's Hotarubi's boyfriend.He's killed by Gyoubu, making him the seventh ninja to die. Ax-Crazy: He looks a tad too happy at the prospect of killing Kouga with hisRazor Floss, sporting aSlasher Smileas he prepares to do so. Ironically, this is also something he seems to have in common with Hotarubi. Defiant to the End: He still tries to killGyoubuwhen the latter has his arms into a solid grip. I Just Want to Be Normal: Yashamaru ''will' fight for the Igas when it's needed, but he mostly just wants to go home and live with his girlfriend in peace. Keet: He's rather energetic and upbeat.

characters.name: Yakushiji Tenzen
characters.description: A very high-ranked Iga ninja serving Ogen, he's one of the strongest members, and surely one of the most evil characters in the manga, and that's saying something.He worked covertly to prolong the Iga-Kouga war. Has an unhealthy attraction for Oboro.Thanks to a parasitic twin living in his body he can comeBack from the Deadat will. Is eventually beheaded by Gennosuke and destroyed when Oboro use herAnti-Magicon the parasite twin while at work, thus nullifying his powers. Adaptation Deviation:In the manga, his parasite is identified as his twin brother, while in the anime the identity of the parasite is left ambiguous. Adaptational Badass: In the manga and novel, he trips over a broken board and only inflicts superficial injuries on Gennosuke before being decapitated. In the anime,he matches Gennosuke blow-for-blow and inflicts several serious injuries on his opponent, including running him through with a katana. Adaptational Villainy: In the manga and novel, Tenzen is still a vicious sadist who takes advantage of the conflict for his own plans and attempts to rape Oboro and Kagero. In the anime, Tenzen is the secret mastermind of the Kouga attack on Tsubagakure to ensure the hatred between the clans would not die. He fully intends to rule Japan itself from the shadows by using his chosen candidate as a puppet shogun while committing a full on massacre. Asshole Victim: After all of the atrocities he committed, up to and includingprolonging the Iga-Kouga warandtrying to rape Oborotwice, Tenzen more than had it coming whenOboro killed him.

characters.name: Azuki Rousai
characters.description: An old shinobi who can stretch his limbs and neck like boneless tentacles. He's grumpy and easy to anger.Meets his doom in Okoi's arms during an attempt at interrogating her. This makes him the sixth ninja to die. Animal Motifs: His elongated skull and his tentacle-like limbs can make you think of a squid.Ironically, he kinda looks like dried squid after Okoi's done with him. Cool Old Guy: Despite his advanced age, he is shown to be strong enough to smash a stone wall to pieces with a kick. Cruel and Unusual Death:Okoi manages to hug him and suck all his blood, turning him in a dried up mummy. Death by IronyWhen he tries to hit Okoi... he gets his blood sucked out.

characters.name: Mino Nenki
characters.description: An odd-looking shinobi with very long and messy hair, huge eyebrows and long nose hairs. He can animate and control all the hairs of his body and can use a long staff.Hyouma use his dojutsu on him, causing him to break all his own bones. This makes him the ninth ninja to die. Animal Motifs: It's subtle, but the sheer hairiness of his body, his fondness for wielding a staff, hisPrehensile Hairand his fondness for aerial attacks all call to mind an ape. Bifurcated Weapon: His staff can actually become an oversized nunchaku. Big Ol' Eyebrows: Gennosuke and Danjou's are nothing compared to this guy. Boisterous Bruiser: He loves fighting and will always do it with gusto. The one time he completely lose his guts is after witnessing the effects of Gennosuke's powers first hand.

characters.name: Chikuma Koshirou
characters.description: A skilled warrior and shinobi, he's very protective towards Oboro and possibly in love with her. He obeys the orders of Tenzen, hisEvil Mentor, but he's not nearly as evil as him. Can fight with two kama sickles and use his breath to form a deadlyRazor Windattack.Halfway through the series he's blinded by Gennosuke, who sends back his wind at him, but learns how to fight while blind. He's eventually poisoned to death by Kagerou, whom he thought was Akeginu thanks to Saemon mimicking her voice to distract him. Bodyguard Crush: His other most important person, aside of hisEvil MentorandParental SubstituteTenzen, is Oboro. He crushes on herhardand wants to protect her with his life. Crazy Jealous Guy: And he is VERY jealous of Gennosuke. The anime accentuates this. Cool Mask: Afterlosing his sight, he wears a rather spiffy black and red one covering hisdamagedeyes and the top of his head Disability Superpower:After being blinded he gains a better sense of hearing, allowing him to fight and kill Hyouma as now he's immune to his gaze.

characters.name: Amayo Jingorou
characters.description: A slug man from Iga who can melt his body with salt in order to lay ambushes and move faster. However too much salt reduce him to a pitiful squealing worm. Water can return him to normal. He's deeply afraid of the ocean for obvious reasons.He's killed by Gyoubu who tosses him in the sea, causing him to melt before Akeginu can help him. This makes him the eleventh ninja to die. Animal Motifs: Slugs. Blessed with Suck: His powers allow him to move very fast and be impredictable in a fight, but if he doesn't get enough water or there's too much salt, he'll be left whimpering in pain and terror. Butt-Monkey: He's often victim of comedic injuries, such as having Josuke slamming into him (anime only) or being kicked in the butt and sent flying by Gyoubu. Dirty Coward: Out of all the Iga ninja, he's perhaps the most cowardly.

characters.name: Akeginu
characters.description: Iga kunoichi, she's a beautiful woman who serves as Oboro's maid and actually cares for her plea. She can expel blood from her skin and use it in battle along with daggers and shortswords. She's in love with Koshirou.She's eventually tricked and captured by Saemon, and stabbed in the heart by Kagerou. Action Girl: She is Oboro's bodyguard, is pretty skilled with daggersandis very good at using her powers to deceive the enemy. Bloody Murder: Her powers are a subtler version of this; she can use her blood to create a mist that disorientates her foes, or which can mark them like ink. Broken Bird: The Iga/Kouga war really gets to her as well, and by the timeshe's the next one to dieshe's jaded, bitter and broken. Crusading Widow:She takes her dear Koshirou's death... badly.

characters.name: Hotarubi
characters.description: Kunoichi from the Iga clan and Yashamaru's lover. She can summon and control insects and snakes to do her bidding. She's only sweet and gentle with Yashamaru, and tends to be violent and rude to anyone else.She's maimed and killed in battle by Saemon. This makes her the tenth ninja to die. Action Girl: One who can fight with daggers and short swords or use her power over animalsto make them kill people. An Arm and a Leg:Saemon takes outbothof her hands with a single katana strike before stabbing her on the chest.AAAAARGH!. Animal Motifs: Butterflies. Her name means Firefly. Ax-Crazy: Deep down the girl has some issues. For examples, she brutally stabs Shougen multiple times after getting spit in the face, and tells about it to Saemon (disguised as Yashamaru) with the most serene smile ever. She also pulls a dagger on Nenki (in the anime) when he jokes on Yashamaru having found another woman while away, though it's played for laughs.

characters.name: Other characters
characters.description: Tokugawa Ieyasu: The elderly former Shogun, who appears to be suffering from some sort of throat cancer as evidencedby the bulbous growth beneath his chin. Although retired, he still possesses enough influence within the government to revoke the Hattori truce in order to resolve the succession dispute. Historically, Ieyasu is regarded asan effective but extremely heartless ruler: Basilisk maintains this image of him as he clearly views both Kouga and Iga as expendable in the face of ensuring political stability and his family's grip on power, thus forcing them to fight to the death. Hattori Hanzou the First (Masanari): The head of a prominent ninja family from Iga Province who would later become chief of the Shogun's intelligence. In the anime, he helped the people of Tsubagakure escape Nobunaga's attack. The peace treaty between Iga Tsubagakure and Kouga Manjidani was originally implemented by him. Hattori Hanzou the Fourth (Masahiro): The third son of Hattori Hanzo and the current leader of the Shogun's intelligence. Although he dislikes the idea of turning Kouga and Iga loose, his loyalty to Ieyasu compels him to nullify his father's anti-war pact for the sake of avoiding civil war among the other Shogunate retainers. He was among the audience that witnessed the duel between Yashamaru and Shogen at Sunpu Castle and would later witness the duel betweenOboro and Gennosuke alongside his adopted son Kyohachiro and Lady Ofuku.Although his demeanorcan be considered cold and non-chalant, he was deeply moved by the second dueland enacts a new peace treaty in which the spoils promised to the winner were evenly distributed between both clans.He also recoves the battle scroll from Ieyasu andsecures it in a hidden alcove of his Japanese-styleBig Fancy House, so that the memory of the 20 chosen ninja would not be completely forgotten. Hattori Kyouhachirou: The nephew and adopted son of Hattori Hanzo the 4th (his birth father was Hattori Hanzo the 2nd). Kyohachiro was charged
